name: Antigravity CLI

latest_major_update.comment: Standalone CLI with plugin layout, rules, skills, hooks, and MCP.

rules.comment: Plugin rules live under plugin rules directories.

custom_commands.comment: Implemented through plugin-provided capabilities rather than a classic slash-command folder.

model_selection.comment: agy --help does not expose a model flag as of this dataset.

continue.comment: Supports --continue for latest conversation and --conversation for a specific conversation.

custom_model_provider.comment: No arbitrary provider configuration found in public CLI help/docs.

notes: Distinct from Gemini CLI and the older Antigravity IDE.

pricing.comment: Pricing source link; exact price not normalized in this matrix.

name: Antigravity IDE

released_in.comment: Exact public release month not confirmed in public docs captured for this dataset.

latest_major_update.comment: New standalone CLI split documented separately from the IDE.

rules.comment: IDE has persistent agent context, but not the same plugin rules path as Antigravity CLI.

skills.comment: Local IDE data includes skills, but public docs are less explicit than CLI plugin docs.

mcp_servers.comment: Local IDE data includes mcp_config.json, but CLI plugin MCP is documented more clearly.

custom_commands.comment: Global workflows are present in local IDE data.

continue.comment: IDE conversation state can be continued from existing history.

non_interactive.comment: Use Antigravity CLI for headless use.

notes: Included as a distinct IDE surface because it is not the same as the new agy CLI.

pricing.comment: Pricing source link; exact price not normalized in this matrix.

released_in.comment: Claude Code was introduced as a limited research preview.

latest_major_update.comment: Current docs cover CLI, SDK, hooks, skills, and settings.

sandbox_mode.comment: Permissions and allowed tools provide sandbox-like controls.

continue.comment: Supports --continue for the most recent conversation.

telemetry.comment: Settings include telemetry and privacy controls.

custom_model_provider.comment: Supports Bedrock/Vertex and related integrations, not arbitrary providers in the same way as OpenAI-compatible CLIs.

pricing.comment: Pricing source link; exact price not normalized in this matrix.

latest_major_update.comment: Captured from current Codex docs/changelog state.

custom_commands.comment: CLI supports slash-like workflows through prompts and tooling, but not a first-class command folder in this matrix.

subagents.comment: Codex supports sub-agent/delegation workflows in agent contexts.

sandbox_mode.comment: Filesystem sandbox modes can be configured.

continue.comment: Supports continuing a previous session through resume/latest-session workflows.

statusline.comment: Supports statusline configuration in local CLI settings.

telemetry.comment: Telemetry settings are documented in the CLI repository.

custom_model_provider.comment: Supports custom model providers in config.

pricing.comment: Pricing source link; exact price not normalized in this matrix.

name: Cursor Agent CLI

form_factor.comment: Installed as cursor-agent or agent on this machine.

released_in.comment: Exact month not confirmed in public docs captured for this dataset.

latest_major_update.comment: Current CLI docs and local versioned binary state.

custom_commands.comment: Cursor supports reusable context/rule workflows; command support varies by surface.

subagents.comment: Agent tasks are supported; first-class named subagents are not modeled like Claude Code.

custom_model_provider.comment: Cursor supports custom API keys/models in settings.

notes: This entry is for the CLI agent surface, not the full IDE.

pricing.comment: Pricing source link; exact price not normalized in this matrix.

name: Cursor IDE

released_in.comment: Exact month not confirmed in public docs captured for this dataset.

latest_major_update.comment: Current docs capture rules, skills, MCP, models, and agent workflows.

custom_commands.comment: Reusable workflows are mostly rules/context driven.

subagents.comment: Supports agentic workflows but not Claude-style named subagents in this matrix.

sandbox_mode.comment: IDE trust and agent controls provide partial sandboxing.

continue.comment: Composer/chat history supports continuing existing conversations.

non_interactive.comment: Use Cursor Agent CLI for headless use.

statusline.comment: Inherited/editor status bar customization, not an agent-specific statusline.

notes: IDE surface included because the comparison covers coding agents, CLIs, and IDEs.

pricing.comment: Pricing source link; exact price not normalized in this matrix.
